V-M-007.checks: Full Tunnel: RoutingManager initializes without errors, get_status() returns TunnelStatus, no ipset/policy references remain.

scenarios.scenario: RoutingManager.initialize() completes without errors and starts scheduler
RoutingManager.get_status() returns TunnelStatus with interface and status fields
Any ipset, split-tunneling, or policy resolver import in routing __init__ or manager.py

removed-scenarios.removed: RUNTIME_ROUTESET_INCREMENTAL — ipset logic removed in Phase-17
RUNTIME_ROUTESET_FULL_REFRESH — ipset logic removed in Phase-17
